mano_cua.result_summary: useCss 选项生成的 PDF 中 Bootstrap table-bordered 的所有边框完全丢失。HTML 页面表格有清晰的行间水平分隔线、列间垂直分隔线和外框线，但 PDF 输出仅显示纯文本数据，无任何分隔线。useCss 无法正确解析 Bootstrap CSS 的 border 样式并渲染到 PDF。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Compared HTML Bootstrap table-bordered table (clear outer border, row separator lines, column separator lines) with generated PDF (useCss:true). PDF shows only plain text data with NO borders at all - no outer border, no row separators, no column separators. The useCss option completely fails to capture Bootstrap CSS border styles.
